items.query: How many days of paid vacation do US full-time employees accrue per year?

items.query: How many weeks of secondary-caregiver parental leave are provided?

items.query: Within how many months of a child's birth or adoption must parental leave be taken?

items.query: Is unused paid vacation carried over to the next year?

Carried-over vacation days expire on March 31 of the following year.

items.query: How many sick days per year do US full-time employees receive?

gt_supporting_facts.text: US full-time employees receive 10 paid sick days per year.

items.query: Can sick days be used to care for a family member?

items.query: How many days of bereavement leave are provided for the death of an immediate family member?

gt_supporting_facts.text: Employees receive 5 paid bereavement days for the death of an immediate family member.

items.query: Who is considered an 'immediate family member' for bereavement leave purposes?
items.gt_answer: Spouse, domestic partner, parent, child, sibling, or in-law equivalents

gt_supporting_facts.text: Immediate family for bereavement includes spouse, domestic partner, parent, child, and sibling.
In-law equivalents are treated as immediate family for bereavement leave.

items.query: Does NovaCorp offer a sabbatical program?

gt_supporting_facts.text: Employees are eligible for a one-month paid sabbatical after every 5 years of continuous service.

items.query: How is jury duty leave compensated?

items.query: What is the NovaCorp 401(k) match for US employees?

items.query: May remote employees work from a country different from their employment jurisdiction?

items.query: Who owns the Remote Work Policy?

items.query: What is the standard target annual bonus for a Senior Engineer at NovaCorp?

items.query: How are annual bonuses weighted between company and individual performance?

items.query: When are annual bonuses paid?

items.query: What is the RSU vesting schedule for new-hire grants?

items.query: What happens to unvested RSUs upon voluntary resignation?

gt_supporting_facts.text: Unvested RSUs are forfeited on the last day of employment upon voluntary resignation.

items.query: What is the salary band structure at NovaCorp?

items.query: Compare bonus target for individual contributors (IC) versus managers at the same level.

items.query: How often are US employees paid?
